step_by_step_thinking:
Your response:

I agree with option C. PCR for rabies virus directly detects viral RNA in real-time, allowing rapid diagnosis even before antibodies develop, which is crucial in acute cases like hydrophobic rabies. This makes it superior to antibody-based tests that may not yet show reactivity in early stages.
